revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-1-110

The operation of an equipment or complex item prior to use, to detect and replace parts that are defective or expected to fail and to correct errors in fabrication or assembly.
